representation_neutral_ontology.downstream_decision_change: normalized host decision surface derived from public response_tendency + canonical policy fields

admission_passed.rule: trace-only support may pass admission if negative controls stay clean and stability controls do not regress

decision_adjacent_passed.rule: requires representation-neutral public shift coverage plus policy/response score above threshold

replay_efficacy_passed.rule: requires downstream decision change coverage and ablation separation; trace-only support is insufficient
